cat <<EOF > test_separability.py
from astropy.modeling import models as m
from astropy.modeling.separable import separability_matrix

cm = m.Linear1D(10) & m.Linear1D(5)
print("Separability matrix for simple compound model:")
print(separability_matrix(cm))

nested_cm = m.Pix2Sky_TAN() & cm
print("\nSeparability matrix for nested compound model:")
print(separability_matrix(nested_cm))
EOF

    # Corrected two-digit year handling according to RFC 7231

                year = str(current_year + int(year))\

EOF
